g.text: # Abstract methods applies_to: applies_to(node: PlanNode) -> bool apply: apply(node: PlanNode, context: Dict) -> RuleApplicationResult } # Concrete rule subclasses ConstantFoldingRule: { shape: class style: { fill: "#E8F5E9" stroke: "#2E7D32" stroke-width: 2 font-color: "#1B5E20" } name: "\"constant_folding\"" priority: 100 sep:

applies_to: "applies_to(node) -> bool" apply: "apply(node, ctx) -> Result" "_is_tautology": "_is_tautology(pred)" "_is_contradiction": "_is_contradiction(pred)" } PredicatePushdownRule: { shape: class style: { fill: "#E8F5E9" stroke: "#2E7D32" stroke-width: 2 font-color: "#1B5E20" } name: "\"predicate_pushdown\"" priority: 10 sep:

applies_to: "applies_to(node) -> bool" apply: "apply(node, ctx) -> Result" "_collect_required": "_collect_required(plan)" "_prune_unnecessary": "_prune_unnecessary(proj, required)" } # RuleEngine with composition RuleEngine: { shape: class style: { fill: "#FFF3E0" stroke: "#E65100" stroke-width: 2 font-color: "#BF360C" } rules: "rules: List[OptimizationRule]" max_iterations: "max_iterations: int = 100" sep:
